programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: Two besties are pooling their cash to buy a shared home in Tulum, Mexico; they want a permanent slice of paradise, but finding a house that suits them both might be the biggest test of their friendship.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A couple thought they had secured the perfect home, until living in it exposed a layout that frustrates hosting, storage, and each other. They're turning to Jonathan and Drew to help decide if they should stay or risk starting over in a new home.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Young and single, a buyer is ready to search for her first home in Cincinnati. She's looking for something hip and near downtown where the action is, but her mother wants her to think about resale value, and babies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.sub-title: A Leap of Love in Tulum
programme.desc: After nine months of dating, a Canadian couple's ready to find a love nest and build a business in Tulum, Mexico; trading snow for sand is easy, but buying a home with a new partner is a risky move that may be too much too soon.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: Two besties are pooling their cash to buy a shared home in Tulum, Mexico; they want a permanent slice of paradise, but finding a house that suits them both might be the biggest test of their friendship.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin return to their alma mater, Jones College, to transform the outdated women's basketball locker room; blending nostalgic collegiate style with heart, they look to create a warm, welcoming second home for the team.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: Two months have passed, and Dave and Jenny are back in Italy to check on the progress of the villa. With new construction challenges unfolding on the stone structure, they now begin to worry that the villa will not be completed by the July deadline.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: After multiple setbacks, Dave and Jenny take a last-minute trip to get the renovation back on track in Italy. They face important design decisions when they arrive and need to come up with creative solutions to an ever-expanding budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: With summer upon them, Dave and Jenny take their five kids on a trip to Italy so they can make major progress at the villa. The Marrs juggle family life and work life in another country as the kids get to see some historic sites.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.sub-title: Italiano: Old Ways Make New Problems
programme.desc: The Marrs take on exterior projects after they discover that construction shuts down in Italy during the summer, which halts progress; Dave learns to adopt Italian construction methods while Jenny explores Italy for historic design elements.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: As opening day nears, Dave and Jenny go the extra mile to take on special projects to complete their friend's centuries-old Italian villa.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: After seven months on the market, Lyndsay and Leslie battle plumbing problems and water damage to get a small home sold; using unique solutions, the twins transform the crowded entrance, tiny bathroom and rotted deck into a tranquil hideaway.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A homeowner needs help letting go of her colorful home of 25 years; the renovation is a real challenge for Lyndsay and Leslie as they look to transform the color cacophony and convoluted layout into a clean and simple oasis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie aid a retiring woman by selling her condo with a cozy Euro-style update; the mood dampens when a ticking time bomb of a plumbing issue rears its head.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Upon learning that a dear member of their team needs to sell her house in a hurry, Lyndsay and Leslie jump into action, promising to forgo any profit to help their best friend.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Sarah and Brian thought this century home would be an undertaking, but they weren't prepared for just how unsuited the main floor layout would be for their active family life.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Carolyn and Billy help Tracy and John update their aging house to suit their active family lifestyle.

programme.title: Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Ron and Jason's 150-year-old farmhouse is in desperate need of repairs; They purchased the property from Ron's 84-year-old grandmother who still lives in the cherished family homestead with them.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Haunted Homes, Bestie Adventures, and True Love
programme.desc: David revisits unforgettable winners to see how their lottery dream homes and lives have transformed. There's spooky Salem dreamers with a friendly ghost, North Carolina besties, and a pair of Florida lovebirds.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple has endured a cramped condo in order to fund their fantasy for a sexy island escape in St. Thomas. They're ready to ditch the city and find a dream home where they can move from their tiny quarters to endless nights of tropical romance.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A DC-based bachelor enlists his wingman/cousin to help find the ultimate waterfront home on the Caribbean island of Bonaire. He's an avid scuba diver and wants a place for entertaining, but his big list of must-haves may be a challenge for his agent.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An engaged couple hunts for a home of their own before they marry in Pennsylvania. He wants a fixer with character while she prefers something updated that's move-in ready, but with their parents involved, setting boundaries may be a challenge.

programme.desc: A successful real estate agent is now in the buyer's seat herself as she looks for a home in Dallas; after a recent divorce, she wants a place that feels like a fresh start, but her best friend is worried she'll end up back in her comfort zone.

programme.desc: An engaged couple looks to buy their first home together before the big day in Enfield, Connecticut; she's pushing for a spacious ranch, but he's tall, and he just wants a simple Colonial with high ceilings.

programme.desc: A Los Angeles couple needs a bigger home for their growing family. He's eyeing a sleek luxury new build while she dreams of a charming bungalow. With one drawn to the warm Valley and the other to the breezy West Side, their house hunt may heat up.

programme.desc: A video game streamer and his wife look to buy their first home in Rochester, Minnesota. He wants something sleek and modern with plenty of space for his online pursuits, but she prefers cozy charm and character with a shorter commute.

programme.desc: A first-time buyer is making the leap to homeownership just outside of Washington, DC; her boyfriend and his sons plan to move in, and he doesn't mind spending for a big place, but she prefers something smaller and more practical.

programme.desc: A buyer uses his best friend as his agent to find his first home in Indianapolis. He wants a place near work with plenty of outdoor space for entertaining, but she thinks his big renovation dreams are out of line with both his budget and reality.

programme.desc: A man bought his mother's house when he got married, but decades later, his wife feels like she could never make it her own; he hopes that Hilary can make this all-original home feel new, and she's excited by the possibilities David has to offer.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the stunning Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore jaw-droppingly affordable and dreamy homes.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain. With a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the US.

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: A couple's ready to find a new property with enough land to expand their wedding business in Hawkesbury. She's dreaming of a spacious, character-filled home with guest accommodations, but he's after a workshop and space for his many projects.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Sold It All for Balestrate, Italy
programme.desc: Empty nesters sell everything and leave Missouri to explore his Sicilian roots in Balestrate, Italy. They want something furnished that has a terrace with sea views, but they may have to make some compromises to find a place fast and in their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: B&B and a Farm in Sarlat-la-Canéda, France
programme.desc: Now that their kids are grown, two Arizona teachers are ready to pursue their dream of opening a bed and breakfast in Sarlat-la-Canéda, France. They also want land for a farm, but with no prior experience, starting a new business may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.sub-title: City Lights or Fairway Nights in Edinburgh
